history) for a patient at all hospitals. /// If onlyMostRelevant is set to false, all events are returned, otherwise only the /// newest event for a particular case is returned. /// Setting hospitalUnitId will filter the results by specified hospital. /// </summary> /// <param name="entityId">The entity id.</param> /// <param name="eventTypes">The event types.</param> /// <param name="onlyMostRelevant">if set to <c>true</c> [only most relevant] events for a case are returned.</param> /// <param name="hospitalUnitId">The hospital unit id.</param> /// <returns></returns> [OperationContract] [FaultContract(typeof(ServiceFault), Action = ServiceFault.ACTION)] [FaultContract(typeof(BusinessRuleFault), Action = BusinessRuleFault.ACTION)] [TransactionFlow(TransactionFlowOption.Allowed)] IList<MedicalEventSR> GetPastEventsForPerson(int entityId, EventTypeCodeData[] eventTypes, bool onlyMostRelevant, int? hospitalUnitId
